rationale: The page provides specific details about the UNESCO Memory of the World International Register, including the governing bodies involved (International Advisory Committee, Director-General of UNESCO), selection criteria, and historical milestones (1997 start date, 570 inscriptions as of 2025).
cleanedText:
How the Programme Works: Registers and Committees
Memory of the World International Register - list of the world's documentary heritage with outstanding global significance
It catalogues documentary heritage that has been recommended by the International Advisory Committee and endorsed by the Director-General of UNESCO, using the selection criteria "world significance and outstanding universal value."
- First inscriptions on the International Register were made in 1997.
- As of April 2025, 570 pieces of documentary heritage - inscribed in the International Register.
